parameters.name: recent_posts
parameters.description: When set to true, returns the 5 most recent posts ordered by their `published_at` field, regardless of any category filters.

200.description: List allograph component features for management.

get.description:
Returns the single ImageText (transcription or translation) for the
given item_image. Anonymous callers see only Live or Reviewed.
Returns 404 if no row exists.

parameters.name: min_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range to filter. Provide an integer representing a year or numeric date value (e.g., 1200).

parameters.name: max_date
parameters.description: End of the date range to filter. Provide an integer representing a year or numeric date value (e.g., 1300).

parameters.name: at_most_or_least
parameters.description: Filter objects with a date difference. Use `at most` to set a maximum difference or `at least` to set a minimum difference.

parameters.name: date_diff
parameters.description: Integer value to specify the date difference for filtering. Works with `at_most_or_least` to apply the filter.

parameters.name: min_date
parameters.description: Start of the date range to filter. Provide an integer representing a year or numeric date value (e.g., 1200).

parameters.name: max_date
parameters.description: End of the date range to filter. Provide an integer representing a year or numeric date value (e.g., 1300).

parameters.name: at_most_or_least
parameters.description: Filter objects with a date difference. Use `at most` to set a maximum difference or `at least` to set a minimum difference.

parameters.name: date_diff
parameters.description: Integer value to specify the date difference for filtering. Works with `at_most_or_least` to apply the filter.

put.description:
Idempotent upsert of the single ImageText (transcription or translation)
for the given item_image. The (item_image, type) pair is unique.

get.summary: List ImageText rows currently in Review status, oldest-first.

post.summary: Move an ImageText through Draft → Review → Live → Reviewed with audit.

assignee.description: Reviewer user id (only meaningful for to_status=Review).

post.description:
Commits a diff of TextAnnotation links for one ImageText in a single
transaction. Each link is either an `upsert` (with region) or a
`delete` (by element_id).

200.description: List folders and images for picker popup.
List item images for selected item part.

get.summary: List graph annotations (read-only). Filter by item_image, annotation_type, hand, allograph, or bbox viewport.

post.summary: Create a new viewer (image-mode) graph annotation. Requires authentication.

patch.summary: Update fields on a viewer graph annotation.

get.summary: List threaded comments on a graph or text-annotation.

post.summary: Create a comment on a graph or text-annotation. Exactly one of `graph` or `text_annotation` is required.
Mark every unread notification as read in one round trip.

get.summary: List worksets visible to the caller (public + owned).

post.summary: Create a new workset owned by the calling user.

get.summary: Lookup by URL slug. 404 unless public or caller is the owner.

404.description: No workset with that slug visible to this caller.

post.summary: Generate a fresh share token for this workset (owner only).

AnnotationCommentWrite.description:
Exactly one of `graph` or `text_annotation` must be provided. The
backend rejects payloads that set both or neither.

mention_usernames_input.description: Usernames to @-mention. Notifications are fanned out on save.

api_key.description: value should start with 'Token' followed by a space then the token
api_key.name: Authorization

tags.name: common-management
tags.description: Management endpoints for shared lookup data
